categories.name: IS THERE A DOCTOR IN THE BOOK?

questions.clue: Dr. Jeremy Stone tries to contain an out-of-this-world biological agent in this Michael Crichton novel

"The Island of" this doctor by H.G. Wells concerns a man trying to turn animals into men
